title: Alfonso Ribeiro on Social Media Fueling ‘Dancing With the Stars’ Success and Urging Contestants to Ignore the Trolls: ‘Why Are We So Mean to One Another?
summary: “Dancing With the Stars” is not like any other reality show. It’s real. title: In season 2 of Sugar, Colin Farrell’s quirky detective becomes much more human
summary: When Colin Farrell was doing press for the first season of the detective series Sugar, he had to be very careful with how he spoke. Sugar is a story about a quirky private detective, but it's also secretly a work of science fiction, something that doesn't become clear until halfway through the seas…
